name: README inventory
input: A README lists every command, file, and current constant.
expected_behavior: Cuts rotting inventory and replaces it with principles plus pointers to source-of-truth files.

name: QEC docs
input: A QEC doc repeats simulator internals from code.
expected_behavior: Keeps detector/logical semantics, assumptions, and evidence pointers without copying mechanics.

name: Benchmark report
input: A GPU benchmark evidence report includes current numbers.
expected_behavior: Allows numbers because the artifact is evidence, while recording device/methodology/provenance.
